_comment: schema: id (string), title (string), description (string), objective { kind: 'catch'|'talk'|'walk'|'visit_dim'|'well_cast', target (string - fish name, npc id, 'any', biome name, or dim name 'Mines'|'Atlantis'|'Inferno'), count (int, defaults 1) }, reward { valu (u64) }. quests auto-start. on completion, valu is granted and the quest is marked done.

title: First Cast
description: Test yer darn rod by catching a single common carp.

title: Fill the Basket
description: The inn's cook is just too busy to catch some fish and his supply runner has disappeared ever since talking to that guy near the well. Fish 3 bluegills for him and, please, don't poison 'em like the last guy.

title: Meet the Village
description: Speak to the Old Angler.

title: Trout Hunter
description: Trouts (much like other fish) form schools. Find out what makes trouts (the rainbow kind) so closely related to schools by catching 5.

title: Stretch Your Legs
description: The weird long nap you woke up from had your legs really numb. Take 200 steps.

title: Desert Trek
description: Every biome houses many, many different kinds of fish. Walk around in the desert biome.

_comment: DIMENSION TUTORIAL QUESTS. Each is given by a thematically-named NPC who hints at the dimension's unlock mechanic.

title: Borin's Shaft
description: Borin is lost. Help him find his way back to the mines, his home, by entering them through the various mineshaft entries.

title: Dante's Descent
description: Dante says the village wells run deeper than well water. Cast a line into any well a hundred times. On the hundredth, the bottom will open. He hasn't been back, but he says it was worth it.

title: Nereus' Invitation
description: Nereus promises you the tales of Atlantis are real. He will take you there, but only once you've proven your worth with 1000 fish caught. The Five Elders do not tolerate slackers.

title: The Shipwright's Hull
description: The Shipwright won't lift a chisel for scurvy dogs with less than 1,250 lifetime catches. Bring him the count, then talk to him on the pier. After that, :inspect (or x) any open water to push off.

_comment: SPECIALTY DIM QUESTS. For each new dim: an 'entry' quest (the thing you do to find/unlock it) and an 'inside' quest (a small fetch once you're there). Catch-by-species targets reference the dim's pool fish; visit_dim quests reference the dim label.

title: Down the Drain
description: Find the sewer entrance and step inside. (Hint: :travel sewer once you have a rod.)

title: Rat Run
description: Pull 8 drain rats out of the sluice. The inn won't ask questions.

title: Steam Calls
description: Find the Hot Spring and let it warm you.

title: The Soaking
description: Reel in 5 soaking koi.

title: Sands of the Inner Chamber
description: Find the Pyramid in the deep desert and step into its first chamber.

title: The Pharaoh's Course
description: Catch 4 mummified sand-eels for the cartouche.

title: Through the Roots
description: Find the Swamp Cave behind the great willow.

title: Bog Census
description: Catch 6 lampreylings for the herbalist.

title: The Hull's Lantern
description: Find the half-sunken Wreckage off the south reef and climb aboard.

title: Salvage
description: Pull up 5 cargo eels from the flooded hold.

title: The Sunken Service
description: Find the Bog Cathedral and step under the broken arches.

title: Last Rites
description: Catch 3 drowned bishops and lay them at the altar.

title: Yours, Reflected
description: Find Mirror Lake. Look at the surface. Don't trust what looks back.

title: The Other Hand
description: Catch 3 doppelganger trout. Each one knows your name.

title: Across the Flat
description: Cross the Iceshelf without freezing. Find the first hole.

title: Cold Catch
description: Catch 5 arctic char through the ice.

title: The Crowd Calls
description: Find the Colosseum. The crowd is already chanting.

title: First Bout
description: Defeat 4 gladiator bass in the pit.

title: Falling Things
description: Find the Crater. The pool at its center is not entirely of this world.

title: Skywriting
description: Catch 3 stardust koi from the comet's wake.

title: The Blue Beyond
description: Reach the All Blue — the final ocean, where every fish that ever swam can spawn.

title: Apex
description: Catch the azure leviathan. Only one will ever bite per save.
